title: Domain Dashboard Action Schema
description: Schema for validating bounded parameter modifications applied through the domain dashboard.

action_id.description: Unique identifier for the dashboard action.

parameter_modified.description: The specific domain parameter modified by this action (e.g., 'enemy_density').

advantage_gained.description: Description of the advantage gained by this action.

risk_incurred.description: Description of the risk incurred or drawback of this action.

resource_cost.description: Resource cost to perform this action.

stability_cost.description: Stability cost incurred by this action (0.0 - 1.0).

playability_preserved.description: Must be true. Action must preserve domain playability.

owner_affected.description: True if the domain owner is directly affected by this change (e.g., increased difficulty for self).
